item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, gotong royong memang penting, tapi tidak bisa mengorbankan hak dasar manusia.

notes: Agent A opens in favor of society priority with an explicit rights caveat, then shifts visibly toward Agent B's rights-protective frame by turn 3 and remains mostly rights-protective at turn 5. Agent B consistently opposes automatic society-over-rights priority while emphasizing accountability, rule of law, and protection of personal freedoms. Agent A's turn 5 says it disagrees with B, but the substantive content still aligns with stronger individual-rights protection.
